Description: Validate prompt creation payload and reject unsupported AI providers.
Pre-Condition:
- Provider is submitted in create prompt request
- Provider must be Gemini or OpenRouter

Description: Validate prompt update payload and reject unsupported AI providers.
Pre-Condition:
- Existing prompt id is provided
- Provider must be Gemini or OpenRouter when updated

Description: Victim or companion cancels an SOS request that is still cancellable.
Pre-Condition:
- SOS request exists
- Requester is owner or registered companion
- SOS status is Pending or Assigned

Description: Coordinator groups SOS requests into a cluster after validation of ids, statuses, duplicate membership and distance threshold.
Pre-Condition:
- At least one SOS request id is provided
- SOS request ids are unique
- All SOS requests exist
- SOS status is Pending or Incident
- SOS requests are not already in another cluster
- Distance between SOS points is within configured limit

Description: Apply core SOS domain rules for creation, message normalization, timestamping and state changes.
Pre-Condition:
- UserId is not empty
- Raw SOS message is not blank
- Location is valid

Description: Owner or companion submits victim updates and the system re-evaluates priority when mission execution has not started.
Pre-Condition:
- SOS request exists
- Requester is owner or registered companion
- Any related mission is still Planned

Description: Depot manager retrieves upcoming return-supply activities and filters by allowed execution statuses.
Pre-Condition:
- User is assigned to an active depot
- Status is OnGoing or PendingConfirmation
- Page size is from 1 to 50

Description: Depot manager retrieves return history with paging, date-range validation and enriched item images.
Pre-Condition:
- User is assigned to an active depot
- Page number is greater than 0
- Page size is from 1 to 50
- FromDate must be before ToDate

Description: Validate inputs before adding a mission activity to an existing mission.
Pre-Condition:
- MissionId is greater than 0
- ActivityType is provided
- Step is positive when sent
- RescueTeamId is positive when sent

Description: Coordinator assigns a rescue team to a mission and updates team mission state to Assigned.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission exists
- Rescue team exists
- Coordinator provides assignment request

Description: Assigned rescue team member completes mission execution and moves the team to waiting-for-report state.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission team exists
- Mission team belongs to the selected mission
- CompletedBy is a member of the rescue team
- Mission team status is not Cancelled or Reported

Description: Validate mission creation payload before mission planning and rescue team assignment are processed.
Pre-Condition:
- ClusterId is greater than 0
- CreatedById is not empty
- Activities collection is present
- Each activity has ActivityType
- RescueTeamId is positive when sent

Description: Coordinator removes a rescue team from a mission and resets team mission state.
Pre-Condition: - Mission team assignment exists

Description: Coordinator updates mission type, priority and planned schedule.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission exists
- Updated mission schedule or priority data is provided

Description: Coordinator changes mission status using valid transitions and synchronizes linked SOS requests when mission starts.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission exists
- New status follows allowed transition rules
- Request does not directly finalize mission through this command

Description: Coordinator updates team incident progress and resolves it with rescue team state handling.
Pre-Condition:
- Team incident exists
- New status follows Reported -> InProgress -> Resolved
- HasInjuredMember is provided when resolving manually

Description: Normalize and validate mission-level incident payloads against route context, decision code rules and rescue-support payload requirements.
Pre-Condition:
- MissionId and MissionTeamId from route are known
- Request scope is Mission
- Context mission and team ids match route
- Decision-specific blocks are present when required

Description: Normalize and validate activity-level incident payloads, including context activities and impact flags.
Pre-Condition:
- MissionId and MissionTeamId from route are known
- Request scope is Activity
- Context contains at least one affected activity

Description: Map team incident entities to response DTOs with fallback incident type, injury/support flags and affected activities.
Pre-Condition:
- Team incident data exists
- Incident sub-type may be generic and requires fallback to detail JSON

Description: Admin creates or updates users with hashed passwords, duplicate detection for phone/email/username and role handling.
Pre-Condition:
- Admin is authenticated
- User phone, email or username must be unique
- Password is hashed before storage

Description: Register rescuer with hashed password and email verification, then login by username or phone returning tokens and permissions.
Pre-Condition:
- Email is unique
- Username or phone is provided for login
- Password is hashed before storage

Description: Admin bans a user clearing their refresh token or unbans a previously banned user.
Pre-Condition:
- User exists
- User is not already banned (for ban)
- User is currently banned (for unban)

Description: Rescuer registers with email verification token, then verifies email to activate account.
Pre-Condition:
- Email verification token is valid
- User exists and is not yet verified

Description: Create, update and retrieve relative profiles with normalization and optional client-provided IDs.
Pre-Condition:
- User exists
- Profile data is normalized before storage

Description: Rescuer login returns tokens and permissions, refresh rotates tokens, logout clears refresh token, and get current user returns full profile.
Pre-Condition:
- Rescuer credentials are valid
- Refresh token is valid and not expired

Description: Assign role to user, set avatar URL, and manage user permissions.
Pre-Condition:
- User exists
- Role exists (for role assignment)
- Avatar URL is valid

Description: Rescuer updates profile fields and submits consent for eligibility step.
Pre-Condition:
- User exists
- All consent flags must be true for step advancement

Description: Create SOS request with priority evaluation, AI analysis queuing and GPS coordinate preservation.
Pre-Condition:
- User exists
- GPS coordinates are provided
- Priority is evaluated and assigned

Description: Generate rescue mission suggestion via AI for a cluster and mark cluster as mission-created on success.
Pre-Condition:
- Cluster exists
- AI service is available
- Cluster is updated on success

Description: Validate generate-mission-suggestion command inputs including cluster ID and user ID.
Pre-Condition:
- ClusterId is greater than 0
- UserId is not empty GUID

Description: Return ranked top-three alternative depots for a given SOS cluster.
Pre-Condition:
- Cluster exists
- Depots are ranked by distance and availability

Description: Parse snake-case suggested activities from AI response into structured mission suggestion DTOs.
Pre-Condition: - Cluster has AI-generated suggestion data

Description: Merge owner and companion SOS requests with deduplication, sorting and latest victim update overlay.
Pre-Condition:
- User exists
- Results are sorted by CreatedAt descending
- Companion flag is set correctly

Description: Return list of SOS clusters with correct SOS request counts and field mapping.
Pre-Condition: - Clusters may or may not exist

Description: Owner, companion or privileged user views SOS evaluation; strangers are forbidden.
Pre-Condition:
- SOS request exists
- Requester is owner, companion or privileged user

Description: Owner, companion or privileged user views SOS request detail with latest victim update overlay.
Pre-Condition:
- SOS request exists
- Requester is owner, companion or privileged user

Description: Validate adjust-inventory command inputs for item ID, quantity change, reason and note constraints.
Pre-Condition:
- ItemModelId is greater than 0
- QuantityChange is not zero
- Reason is not empty and within 500 characters

Description: Validate create-depot command inputs for name, address, coordinates, capacity and weight capacity.
Pre-Condition:
- Name and address are not empty
- Latitude is between -90 and 90
- Longitude is between -180 and 180
- Capacity and weight capacity are positive

Description: Validate create-supply-request inputs for non-empty requests, unique depot IDs and positive item quantities.
Pre-Condition:
- Requests list is not empty
- Source depot IDs are unique
- Item quantities are positive

Description: Initiate or finalize depot closure by creating closure records or saving tracked changes for completed closures.
Pre-Condition:
- Depot exists
- Depot may have an existing closure record

Description: Handle adding a mission activity checking mission existence, supply availability and rescue team assignment.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission exists
- Supplies are sufficient
- Activity is created with Planned status

Description: Assign a rescue team to a specific mission activity, creating mission team if not already present.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity exists
- Team may or may not already be in mission

Description: Confirm delivery of supplies and merge consumable surplus into existing return activity.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity exists with delivery items
- Consumable surplus is merged into return activity

Description: Confirm mission supply pickup with buffer usage validation and item existence checks.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity exists with items
- Buffer usage requires a reason
- Items must exist in activity

Description: Confirm return of supplies using expected reusable unit count from quantity snapshot.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity exists with return items
- Quantity snapshot determines expected reusable units

Description: Handle mission creation with supply reservation for collect-supplies activities.
Pre-Condition:
- Cluster exists
- Supply reservation must succeed
- Only collect-supplies activities trigger reservation

Description: Report incident on a specific mission activity with mission status, team membership and activity existence checks.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission exists and is OnGoing
- Reporter is a member of the assigned team
- Activity belongs to the mission

Description: Report incident on a mission team with mission status, team existence and reporter membership checks.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission exists and is OnGoing
- Mission team exists and belongs to mission
- Reporter is a member of the team

Description: Send a message in a conversation after validating participant membership and non-empty content.
Pre-Condition:
- Sender is a participant in the conversation
- Content is not empty or whitespace

Description: Sync batch of mission activity updates with snapshot replay, mixed outcome reporting and batch validation.
Pre-Condition:
- Batch is not empty and within 100 items
- ClientMutationIds and MissionActivity pairs are unique
- QueuedAt is valid and enum is in range

Description: Update mission activity status within a transaction and validate command inputs including IDs, status enum and image URL.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity and mission IDs are positive
- Status is a valid enum value
- DecisionBy is not empty
- ImageUrl is absolute when provided

Description: Update mission activity details including assembly point changes, step immutability for ongoing activities and supply re-validation.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity exists
- Activity status determines which fields can change
- Old reservations are released before new validation

Description: Validate update-mission command for duplicate activities, required updatedBy field, change presence and valid item payloads.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity IDs are unique
- UpdatedBy is required when activities are provided
- Each activity has at least one changed field

Description: Validate update-mission-status command inputs including mission ID, status enum and decision-by ID.
Pre-Condition:
- MissionId is positive
- Status is a valid enum value
- DecisionBy is not empty

Description: Query mission activities and map image URL from activity model.
Pre-Condition: - Mission exists with activities

Description: Build AI suggestion section preferring validated activities over draft, with snake-case metadata mapping.
Pre-Condition:
- Suggestion blob data may or may not exist
- Validated activities take precedence over draft

Description: Execute activity status changes persisting image URL for terminal statuses and intercepting return-supplies to pending confirmation.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity status change is valid
- Image URL is persisted for Succeed and Failed statuses

Description: Rebuild expected return units using picked snapshot without falling back to planned units.
Pre-Condition: - Picked snapshot exists for the activity

Description: Validate rescue team creation inputs including name, type, assembly point, member count and leader requirements.
Pre-Condition:
- Name is not empty and within 255 characters
- Type is a valid enum
- MaxMembers is between 6 and 8
- Exactly one leader is in member list

Description: Apply depot domain rules for creation, manager assignment, utilization updates, status transitions and manager removal.
Pre-Condition:
- Capacity and weight capacity are positive
- Manager ID is not empty for assignment
- Utilization does not exceed capacity
- Status transitions follow allowed rules

Description: Apply depot fund rules for credit, debit, advance and repay operations with balance and amount validations.
Pre-Condition:
- Amount must be positive for credit, advance and repay
- Sufficient balance is required for debit and repay

Description: Validate fund transaction creation and state management rules.
Pre-Condition:
- Transaction data is provided
- Amount and type are valid

Description: Apply rescue team domain rules for creation, code generation, member management and max-members validation.
Pre-Condition:
- MaxMembers is between 6 and 8
- Members cannot exceed max
- Duplicate users are not allowed

Description: Resolve AI prompt execution settings using provider defaults or encrypted prompt API key overrides.
Pre-Condition:
- Prompt configuration exists
- Provider defaults are used when no override

Description: Format Gemini API requests preserving native function call parts, replaying stored signatures and multi-step tool use patterns.
Pre-Condition:
- API key is configured
- Function call parts and signatures are present

Description: Send OpenAI-compatible payloads via OpenRouter and map tool call responses.
Pre-Condition:
- API key is configured
- Request follows OpenAI format

Description: Protect and unprotect prompt secrets with master key, handling missing keys and plaintext passthrough.
Pre-Condition:
- Master key may or may not be configured
- Protected values round-trip correctly

Description: Consume reserved supplies for consumable items without requiring reusable unit tracking.
Pre-Condition:
- Reserved supply exists
- Consumable items do not require reusable units

Description: Map prompt entities to domain defaulting provider to Gemini when stored provider is missing or invalid.
Pre-Condition:
- Prompt entity exists
- Provider field may be null or invalid

Description: Route AI model test requests to the correct provider based on prompt configuration.
Pre-Condition: - Prompt configuration specifies a provider

Description: Parse mission suggestions, normalize supply shortages, enforce single-depot constraint and format estimated durations.
Pre-Condition:
- AI response contains suggestion JSON
- Supply shortages may reference multiple depots

Description: Mask secrets by hiding middle characters for long secrets and fully masking short secrets.
Pre-Condition: - Secret may be null, short or long

Description: Validate mission and mission-activity status transitions using allowed and invalid transition rules.
Pre-Condition:
- Current status and target status are provided
- Transitions follow defined state machine rules

Description: End-to-end happy path from SOS creation through clustering and mission planning with valid state transitions.
Pre-Condition:
- SOS request is created with Pending status
- Cluster is initialized
- Mission starts as Planned

Description: Activity failure and continuation: OnGoing to Failed is valid, Failed is terminal, next activity can start after failure.
Pre-Condition:
- Activity is OnGoing
- Team incident follows Reported to Resolved cycle

Description: Mission-level incident handling: OnGoing mission can become Incompleted (terminal), rescue team becomes stuck.
Pre-Condition:
- Mission is OnGoing
- Rescue team is on mission

Description: Reject duplicate and empty SOS IDs, accept unique IDs for cluster creation.
Pre-Condition: - SOS request IDs are provided

Description: Reject empty and duplicate IDs for cluster creation, accept single SOS.
Pre-Condition: - SOS request IDs are provided

Description: Available team can be assigned; Gathering, Assigned and OnMission teams cannot accept new mission assignment.
Pre-Condition: - Rescue team exists with a known status

Description: Cancel mission assignment returns team to Available; handover decision is processed for team incidents.
Pre-Condition:
- Rescue team is Assigned
- Team incident exists for handover

Description: Buffer calculation matches handler logic with configurable ratio, total-with-buffer and negative-ratio clamping.
Pre-Condition:
- Quantity and buffer ratio are provided
- Default buffer ratio is 10%

Description: Haversine distance calculations for same point, long distance, nearby points and cross-equator scenarios.
Pre-Condition: - GPS coordinates are provided for two points

Description: SOS status transitions for incident redirect: InProgress to Incident, Incident can be reclustered or go back to Assigned.
Pre-Condition: - SOS request is InProgress

Description: SOS cluster controller exposes alternative-depots route with correct HTTP method and path template.
Pre-Condition: - Controller is registered

Description: Mission controller integration tests for route registration and endpoint behavior.
Pre-Condition: - Controller is registered

No: - Affected activities are loaded when available"
